title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cyient

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cyient
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Cyient in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cyient:
Cyient is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient!
